_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct AI impact assessments for new and materially modified AI systems, producing documented risk findings with recommended mitigations and residual risk statements.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.648), RC-T-012 (RC, cosine: 0.646).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.674). Shared vocabulary: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only terms [application, assessment, behaviors, change, consequences, detected] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, conduct, documented, findings, impact, materially] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.872, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoe" and "Conduct AI impact assessments for new and materially modified AI systems, produc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.693 ≈ STS 0.674 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only: [application, assessment, behaviors, change, consequences, detected]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, conduct, documented, findings, impact, materially].
